Arthropoda > Insecta > Hemiptera > Heteroptera > Pentatomidae

Mangrove shield bugs

Calliphara nobilis

Updated Nov 2019

Where seen?

This colourful insect is sometimes seen in numbers in our mangroves.

Features

Adults about 1-1.5cm long. The larvae are only found on Buta buta trees ( Excoecaria algallocha ), where they feed on the developing seeds. But the adults may be found in groups under large leaves of any mangrove plant.

Adult. Sungei Buloh Wetland Reserve, Aug 03
Juvenile. Sungei Buloh Wetland Reserve, Jan 04
A group of adults. Sungei Buloh Wetland Reserve, May 03
Juveniles on Buta buta fruits. Pulau Ubin, Jan 04

Mangrove shield bugs on Singapore shores
